'''âm-p-h-r''' ('''kamapheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:walrus|walrus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:walrus|walrus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-p-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kamapheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimapheroko|thimapheroko]] || [[word:jimapheroko|jimapheroko]] || [[word:shimapheroko|shimapheroko]] || [[word:kimapheroko|kimapheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumapheroko|thuthumapheroko]] || [[word:jujumapheroko|jujumapheroko]] || [[word:shushumapheroko|shushumapheroko]] || [[word:kukumapheroko|kukumapheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumapheroko|thumapheroko]] || [[word:jumapheroko|jumapheroko]] || [[word:shumapheroko|shumapheroko]] || [[word:kumapheroko|kumapheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumapheroko|thumapheroko]] || [[word:jumapheroko|jumapheroko]] || [[word:shumapheroko|shumapheroko]] || [[word:kumapheroko|kumapheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themapheroko|themapheroko]] || [[word:jemapheroko|jemapheroko]] || [[word:shemapheroko|shemapheroko]] || [[word:kemapheroko|kemapheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomapheroko|thothomapheroko]] || [[word:jojomapheroko|jojomapheroko]] || [[word:shoshomapheroko|shoshomapheroko]] || [[word:kokomapheroko|kokomapheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomapheroko|thomapheroko]] || [[word:jomapheroko|jomapheroko]] || [[word:shomapheroko|shomapheroko]] || [[word:komapheroko|komapheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomapheroko|thomapheroko]] || [[word:jomapheroko|jomapheroko]] || [[word:shomapheroko|shomapheroko]] || [[word:komapheroko|komapheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmapheroko|thĂŠmapheroko]] || [[word:jĂŠmapheroko|jĂŠmapheroko]] || [[word:shĂŠmapheroko|shĂŠmapheroko]] || [[word:kĂŠmapheroko|kĂŠmapheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamapheroko|thathamapheroko]] || [[word:jajamapheroko|jajamapheroko]] || [[word:shashamapheroko|shashamapheroko]] || [[word:kakamapheroko|kakamapheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamapheroko|thamapheroko]] || [[word:jamapheroko|jamapheroko]] || [[word:shamapheroko|shamapheroko]] || [[word:kamapheroko|kamapheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamapheroko|thamapheroko]] || [[word:jamapheroko|jamapheroko]] || [[word:shamapheroko|shamapheroko]] || [[word:kamapheroko|kamapheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamapherithi|shamapherithi]] || [[word:shamapheriji|shamapheriji]] || [[word:shamapherishi|shamapherishi]] || [[word:shamapheriki|shamapheriki]]
